live_blockers.label: Days with at least half coverage

strategy.description: Fixed $25 order, 2s latency, 2c slippage cap; select by risk-adjusted prior score.

runtime_contract.diagnostic_note: Posterior estimates use simple independent beta priors for fill probability and filled-win probability, with actual observed fill odds held fixed. Treat this as edge uncertainty telemetry until more selected forward days are available.

maker_shadow.promotion_requirement: must beat always-taker in prior-only route walk-forward

runtime_contract.allowed_paper_action: Shadow-log bucket classifications and compare hypothetical bucket multipliers against the unfiltered selected policy. Do not suppress or size real orders from this table.
Compare prior-only bucket labels against the next selected-policy day. Use the labels for shadow logging only until enough later folds exist.
Log observed latency, fill price, and available top-of-book size against this grid. Do not raise live size from stress results while the promotion gate is paper-only.

runtime_contract.first_signal_order: highest seconds_left first, then earliest timestamp, then rule order

runtime_contract.diagnostic_note: This applies the current config rule to every clean model-ready market. Rows outside the selected prior-only replay can help diagnose rule breadth, but they are not promotion evidence.

runtime_contract.paper_sizing_note: Use this to choose paper stake size and drawdown alerts. Do not enable live size from this artifact while the promotion gate is paper-only.

runtime_contract.diagnostic_note: This selector chooses paper order size only from tested order sizes that pass both bankroll risk constraints and posterior edge thresholds. It is not a live-sizing approval.

runtime_contract.paper_logging_note: Log the signal-depth-capped recommendation beside the fixed stake. Do not change order size until this diagnostic is validated on later clean 5-minute markets.

maker_1c.reason: Queue-aware maker 1c walk-forward has no passing rules.

interpretation: order_25_2s_2c_risk_adjusted is configured for paper only using Taker cross routing. Live execution remains disabled by 5 promotion blocker(s).
